  • Method Details

    • loadData

      public <T> T loadData(Class<T> type, File file) throws IOException, ActionCancelledException, NoFileCreatedException
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Loads an instance of the given type from the specified file. This implementation reads data from a ZIP file and reconstructs the requested type from JSON entries. Legacy archives provide a company_data.json entry that serializes the entire Company. Modern archives include modular entries for the chart of accounts, company profile, and ledger (chart_of_accounts.json, company_profile.json, and ledger.json respectively). When loading a Company, those modular sections are merged after deserialization. Requests for individual components (e.g. ChartOfAccounts) are satisfied directly from their dedicated entries when present.
      Specified by:
      loadData in interface DataStorer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the object to load
      Parameters:
      type - the Class of the object to load
      file - the file to read from (expected to contain JSON)
      Returns:
      the deserialized object
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs while reading or parsing the file
      ActionCancelledException - if file chooser is cancelled
      NoFileCreatedException

    • saveData

      public void saveData(Object obj, File file) throws IOException, ActionCancelledException, NoFileCreatedException
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Saves the given object to the specified file in JSON format. This implementation writes data to a ZIP file. For general objects a single company_data.json entry is produced. When persisting a Company, modular entries for the profile, ledger, and chart of accounts are also written so that the archive can be partially extracted without deserializing the entire aggregate. The legacy company_data.json entry is still written to preserve backwards compatibility.
      Specified by:
      saveData in interface DataStorer
      Parameters:
      obj - the object to serialize
      file - the file to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs while writing the file
      ActionCancelledException - if file chooser is cancelled
      NoFileCreatedException

    • listFiles

      public List<File> listFiles(File directory, String extension)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Lists all files in the given directory (non-recursively) whose names end with the specified extension.
      Specified by:
      listFiles in interface DataStorer
      Parameters:
      directory - the directory to search
      extension - the file extension filter (e.g. ".npbk" or "json")
      Returns:
      a List of matching File instances; empty if none found or directory invalid
